steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between the two lighthouse keepers. A correct answer must explicitly contrast the two keepers — not describe only one of them and not highlight a similarity.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — As the lighthouse keeper at Point Fermin Light, Nora Whitaker helped watercraft navigate at night.: This describes only Nora Whitaker and makes no comparison to Clara Bennett Hayes. ✗
  • Choice B — From 1862 to 1880, the nighttime waters of Maine were made more navigable thanks to Clara Bennett Hayes.: This describes only Clara Bennett Hayes and makes no comparison to Nora Whitaker. ✗
  • Choice C — Clara Bennett Hayes worked as a lighthouse keeper in an earlier century than did Nora Whitaker.: This directly contrasts the two keepers by noting Clara served in the 1800s (1862–1880) while Nora served in the 1900s (1925–1941) — a clear difference drawn from the notes. ✓
  • Choice D — Clara Bennett Hayes and Nora Whitaker both played crucial roles in ensuring safe navigation for watercraft in past centuries.: "Both" emphasizes a similarity, not a difference. ✗
C is correct.
